name: local-llm skill routes the triage operation to local model when local-llm is available
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/local-llm/route.sh" --operation triage --availability-stub available 2>out.txt && grep -q 'route=local-llm' out.txt && grep -q 'operation=triage' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
